blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,537 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 24.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
